name: Can parties ever see AEO materials?
description: **No for parties; pro se motion possible.** Redactions common.[2][4]

mainEntity.name: Can parties ever see AEO materials?

acceptedAnswer.text: **No for parties; pro se motion possible.** Redactions common.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Parties generally cannot see AEO materials, but courts may allow redacted versions.** Balance protects secrets vs. defense rights.[2] Key factors: Highly confidential only. Pro se gets exceptions via motion.[4] No automatic access. Propose 'confidential' tier instead. Negotiate order terms early.
